title: davallia capillacea
intro: Davallia capillacea, also known as stone flower or lion's mane fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Davalliaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Davallia capillacea include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and its extracts are also used in modern medicine to develop new pharmaceuticals.
